response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep systems expertise across distributed, high-throughput environments and strong ownership through open-source contributions and operational roles, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Acme — aligning well with the agentic engineering context. His Python experience is unconfirmed, but his TypeScript, distributed systems work, and stakeholder coordination are robust. The lack of explicit Python mastery and limited evidence of AI/ML product hands-on experience are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic code generation workflows at current role
Extensive background in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational ownership evidenced by open-source projects, CI/CD setup, and on-call-like maintenance of critical systems
concerns: Python expertise not explicitly stated or demonstrated in resume despite being a must-have
Limited evidence of direct LLM/ML product experience or AI-native engineering environment exposure beyond tooling
German language proficiency is basic, which may hinder stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based team
